description: Pilot: deploy companies-house-sync (live CH rewrite + version probe) under the release convention.
source_commit_sha: TO_FILL_AT_LOCK — git rev-parse HEAD at the moment the window is locked
release_commit_sha: TO_FILL_AFTER_STAMP — the commit created by stamping VERSION.ts

asserts: behavioural: action=search returns items[] (200) — proves live CH path, not stale mock
verification.evidence: TO_FILL — raw probe JSON + smoke response

rollback: Re-stamp VERSION.ts to the prior source_commit_sha and redeploy companies-house-sync; the function's behaviour is unchanged by the stamp, so rollback is deploy-only. No DB/data changes in this release.
notes: Pilot ONLY tests whether Lovable can faithfully execute a declared revision. If the probe returns unset/wrong source_sha, or the smoke fails, the executor must move to CI (see convention §8, §1a).
